description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a boxy, geometric design and large rectangular windows dominating the front and rear facades. The structure features a prominent driveway and garage at the front, with a fenced perimeter and a small entry gate. The rear side includes a patio area and what appears to be a set of sliding glass doors leading to the backyard. The exterior is primarily smooth and light-colored, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on clean lines. The property includes landscaped elements such as a driveway, walkways, and a small garden area. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a garage, and a fenced yard, featuring clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, garage, and driveway with a fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall, small window, and the length of the fenced property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying sliding glass doors, grouped windows, and a patio area with garden features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mostly solid wall with minimal openings and the extent of the property boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and rear facades
